description: Perform an impact analysis to identify road segments within 500 meters of monitoring stations. Using the 'Monitoring Stations' (/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson) and 'Road Network' (/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_lines.geojson) datasets, isolate the road segments within the 500-meter buffer zone. Ensure calculations are performed using EPSG:32610 (UTM Zone 10N) for accurate metric distance. The resulting layer must include a field named 'impact_len' containing the length of each segment in meters. Export the final dataset to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/impacted_roads_500m.geojson.
